# terrible_cisco_meraki_meraki_mx_vlan (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `appliance_ip` (String) IP address of appliance. Address must be within subnet specified in `subnet` parameter.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `dhcp_boot_filename` (String) Filename to boot from for DHCP boot
- `dhcp_boot_next_server` (String) DHCP boot option to direct boot clients to the server to load boot file from.
- `dhcp_boot_options_enabled` (Boolean) Enable DHCP boot options
- `dhcp_handling` (String) How to handle DHCP packets on network.
- `dhcp_lease_time` (String) DHCP lease timer setting
- `dhcp_options` (String) List of DHCP option values
- `dhcp_relay_server_ips` (String) IP addresses to forward DHCP packets to.
- `dns_nameservers` (String) Semi-colon delimited list of DNS IP addresses. Specify one of the following options for preprogrammed DNS entries opendns, google_dns, upstream_dns
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `fixed_ip_assignments` (String) Static IP address assignments to be distributed via DHCP by MAC address.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `name` (String) Name of VLAN.
- `net_id` (String) ID of network which VLAN is in or should be in.
- `net_name` (String) Name of network which VLAN is in or should be in.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `reserved_ip_range` (String) IP address ranges which should be reserve and not distributed via DHCP.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Specifies whether object should be queried, created/modified, or removed.
- `subnet` (String) CIDR notation of network subnet.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `vlan_id` (Number) ID number of VLAN. ID should be between 1-4096.
- `vpn_nat_subnet` (String) The translated VPN subnet if VPN and VPN subnet translation are enabled on the VLAN.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `response` (String) Information about the organization which was created or modified
